settings.unwrapIntro: Already ramping on the BDR toolkit. Working demos, plus HubSpot Academy sales certifications.
settings.aboutBio: I'm Daniel — a Carpinteria native based in Santa Barbara. I studied Economics & Business at Westmont College, I'm bilingual in English and Spanish, and I build and ship my own software (you're looking at some of it). I'm now taking that builder's instinct into software sales, where technical fluency meets the customer conversation.

posts.title: On the Nature of Creative Work
posts.content: A longer exploration of how creativity intersects with discipline, and why the most meaningful work often emerges from constraint rather than freedom.

posts.quote: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.

posts.title: Your First Blog Post
posts.content: This is where your blog post excerpt will appear. Write about anything that interests you.

posts.quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.

posts.title: The Quiet Architecture of Habit
posts.content: How small, repeated actions compound into the invisible structure of our lives, and why understanding this changes everything about how we approach change.

apps.name: AllTime
apps.subtitle: The AI-powered super calendar for health, accountability, and consistency.
apps.description: A health-forward super calendar for iPhone, Mac, and Apple Watch. Apple, Google, and Outlook sync in one timeline, with workouts, nutrition, goals, cycle tracking, focus, scheduling, and to-dos built in, plus an AI assistant that drags, plans, and builds your day.

apps.name: Arrow
apps.subtitle: Meta Quest prototype for Spatial Messaging
apps.description: A Meta Quest prototype for spatial messaging by sending messages as physical objects and having them land in the recipients spatial environment. Built for personal use; reach out if you'd like access.

apps.name: BoomSphere
apps.subtitle: VisionOS app for experiencing music visually
apps.description: A visionOS app that turns music into a living, spatial visualization you can step inside. Built for personal use; reach out if you'd like TestFlight access.

apps.name: LifeMates
apps.subtitle: iOS app for keeping personal relationships consistent and healthy
apps.description: An iOS app that nudges you to stay in touch with family and friends, on a cadence you set per person, with a simple log of every check-in. Built for personal use; reach out if you'd like TestFlight access.

apps.name: Apollo
apps.subtitle: Hands-free voice control for simultaneous Claude Code projects
apps.description: A JARVIS-like app for macOS that lets you drive multiple Claude Code projects entirely by voice, hands-free, so you can code and direct your agent while away from the keyboard using native LLMs. Built for personal use; reach out if you'd like access.

experience.title: Creator & Solo Developer
bullets: Designed, shipped, and sold a full-stack SaaS product end to end, converting 17.7% of trials to paid.
Built automated, AI-driven growth workflows end to end (Gemini, edge-function automation) — comfortable scaling outreach with tooling rather than brute force.
Instrumented growth with Mixpanel and AppsFlyer funnels and acted on the data — thinking in targeting, conversion, and pipeline, not just activity.

experience.title: Freelance — Web, Video, Design & IT
bullets: Sustained a repeat local client base for 9+ years — measured by continuous engagements since 2016 — by delivering websites, promotional video, brand design, and IT support end to end.
Owned every engagement from first conversation to paid invoice — measured by clients returning for follow-on work — by scoping projects directly with owners and delivering on deadline.

experience.title: Production Lead III, Sports Broadcasting
bullets: Built and retained relationships with marquee clients — ESPN, NBC Sports, the LPGA, and USA National Water Polo — earning repeat business and four promotions.
Coordinate production processes and schedules to deliver seamless live-stream broadcasts under real deadlines.
Create graphics and narratives that strengthen brand visibility and the audience experience.

experience.title: Business Development Intern
bullets: Delivered persuasive presentations that translated complex technical concepts into clear, accessible value propositions for prospective clients.
Built client relationships with tailored solutions and ongoing support, and researched emerging tools to improve the agency’s operational efficiency.

experience.title: Features Writer
bullets: Authored in-depth features capturing executives’ insights on leadership, innovation, and industry strategy, distributed campus-wide.
Interviewed senior leaders and translated dense, high-level conversations into clear, engaging stories.

experience.title: Competitive Pitch Winner & Team Lead (New Venture Challenge & Get REAL Accelerator)
bullets: Won the $10,000 grand prize and $2,000 pitch prize at the New Venture Challenge against a competitive field of finalist teams.
Led a cross-disciplinary team from concept to MVP and pitched the venture to investors and mentors, building support from zero.
Cold-emailed my way into meetings with senior leaders at Google and Apple.

experience.title: Committee Leader & Member (Various)
bullets: Served on and helped lead the District Technology Committee, Makerspace Committee, and Associated Student Government.
Drove a 30% lift in event turnout by building websites, promotional materials, and digital-media campaigns across student government and ambassador programs.

education.title: Westmont College
bullets: Activities & societies: Omicron Delta Epsilon Honors, Student Alumni Association, Horizon Newspaper, Rugby Club, DSPS Volunteer.

education.title: Santa Barbara City College
bullets: Activities & societies: Associated Student Government, Get REAL Accelerator Grand Prize Winner, New Venture Challenge Pitch Competition Awardee, District Technology Committee (student body representative), International Student Ambassador Program, Makerspace Committee, Passion Project Club, Book Club.

heroMessages.text: I'm Daniel. I grew up in Carpinteria, studied econ and business at Westmont, and I spend most of my time building things I wish existed.
This is my portfolio. What do you want to see first?
